configurations.name: dev
runtimeArgs: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && exec yarn dev

configurations.name: dev-preview
runtimeArgs: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && exec yarn dev --port 5188 --strictPort

configurations.name: agent-server
runtimeArgs: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && exec yarn agent:server

configurations.name: prod-preview
runtimeArgs: source $HOME/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 24 >/dev/null && yarn build && exec yarn preview --port 4173
